arts.ttl: West Ham v Wolves: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 8pm GMT kick-off Live scoreboard | Read Football Daily | And mail Michael Last week, a struggling side near the bottom of the table faced Wolves at home … and came through to win 4-0. How Everton needed that victory, particularly when you consider the Toffees’ next three games are against Arsenal, Chelsea and Manchester City, with the re-arranged Merseyside derby also surely in the not-too-distant future. A good win for Everton, but a bad defeat for Wolves, who remain 19th. Their festive run is not nearly so difficult as Everton, although the upcoming games against West Ham, Leicester and Ipswich before Christmas are arguably more important in deciding whether Wolves will avoid relegation come the end of the season. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Emerson and Summerville start Wolves clash
arts.sum: Alongside Todibo on the bench will be goalkeeper Alphonse Areola, defenders Aaron Cresswell and Coufal, midfielders Lucas Paquetá, Guido Rodríguez and Luis Guilherme and forwards Ings and Niclas Füllkrug, who marked his return from injury with a first West Ham goal at Leicester. West Ham United: Fabiański, Wan-Bissaka, Mavropanos, Kilman, Emerson, Soler, Souček, Álvarez, Kudus, Summerville, Bowen ©

arts.ttl: West Ham to show support for Michail Antonio ahead of Wolves clash
arts.sum: The forward is in a stable condition following a serious road accident

arts.ttl: Michail Antonio update, best-case scenario and West Ham star's first words after horror crash
arts.sum: The Sun reports that after a serious car accident, it took 45 minutes for emergency services to extricate West Ham star Michail Antonio from his vehicle. Michail Antonio's future in football remains uncertain, following a terrifying car crash that resulted in "serious damage" to one of his legs, according to reports.

arts.ttl: West Ham confirm Michail Antonio plans for Wolves match after horror car crash
arts.sum: West Ham striker Michail Antonio remains in a London hospital after undergoing surgery on a lower limb fracture suffered in a serious car crash in Essex on Saturday

arts.ttl: Report shares 15-trophy manager's stance over West Ham and other interested clubs
arts.sum: Massimiliano Allegri has rejected every enquiry and proposal that has come his way amid interest from West Ham United, according to Tutto Mercato Web. The... The post Report shares 15-trophy manager's stance over West Ham and other interested clubs appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: West Ham watched £25m forward play on Sunday with January move now possible
West Ham players to show support for hospitalized Antonio before Wolves match in Premier League
arts.sum: The players will warm up in “Antonio 9” jerseys and walk on to the field in tops adorning his name, West Ham said. West Ham players will show their support for teammate Michail Antonio following his serious injury in a car crash by wearing items of clothing bearing the striker’s name ahead of the Premier League game against Wolverhampton on Monday.

arts.ttl: Manager Gary Lineker called 'Very Talented' ready to take West Ham job until end of May - report
